options.name: --assemblynametolookfor
options.description: Filter for dll(s) with this AssemblyName

options.name: --dllstoskip
options.description:
Filter, comma separated list of strings of dlls file
names to skip, defaults to none

options.name: --expectedversion
options.description:
Assert that this version number was set properly on
the dlls

options.name: --notmajoronly
options.description:
Assert AssemblyVersion is the --expectedversion, by
default we assert its MAJOR.0.0.0

options.name: --publickey
options.description:
Assert this public key token makes it way on the
AssemblyName for the dlls

options.name: --tempfolder
options.description:
The temp folder location in which to extract the
package contents

options.name: --skipreleasemode
options.description:
Skip validation that the dlls are built in release
mode

options.name: --nofailonmissingdlls
options.description: Don't fail when no dlls are found, defaults to false

options.name: --nodependencies
options.description:
Assert the package has NO dependencies, defaults to
false
